normalattack.name: Skirmishing Spear
normalattack.description:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 4 consecutive spear strikes, and applies the {LINK#N11500004}<color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Mark</color>{/LINK} to the last opponent hit.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to perform a spinning attack.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.

elementalskill.name: Thunderbolt Ambush
elementalskill.description: Follows her hunter's instincts. Tap or hold to produce different effects as well as apply to the opponent the {LINK#N11500004}Hunter's Mark{/LINK} effect. Tapping Fires at opponents in front of her, dealing AoE Electro DMG. Holding Goes into aiming mode, then targets opponents within a certain area in front of her. Alyosha's Interruption RES is enhanced when in this mode. At the end of the button hold, she deals Electro DMG to the targeted opponents. The reckless hunter once reached for the spear's edge, and it was only after they survived a lesson paid in blood that they came to understand the harsh truths of survival on the frozen plains.

elementalburst.name: Hunter's Advance
elementalburst.description: Summons her trusted companion {LINK#N11500005}Tugarin{/LINK} to fight alongside her on the field. This also turns an area in front of her into a Fulgurite Hunting Field for a short time. Fulgurite Hunting Field · Continuously taunts nearby opponents to incite them to attack. · Every 2s, deals an instance of AoE Electro DMG to any opponent that has wandered into the field. Wait. Keep waiting until the impatience fades. That's when the red-bellied plover shall sweep across the birch grove and present itself before one's arrow.

p1.name: The Treeline Rouses
p1.description: When {LINK#N11500005}<color=#FFD780FF>Tugarin</color>{/LINK} attacks, it will also restore HP to nearby party members at 120% of Alyosha's ATK.

p2.name: Farewell, Winter Wheat
p2.description: Increases the DMG Alyosha deals with her Elemental Skill and Elemental Burst by 0.35% for every 1% of her Energy Recharge. Up to a 70% increase can be obtained in this way.

p3.name: Into the Fray
p3.description: Alyosha will enter the <color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color> state when inside a {LINK#N11330003}<color=#FFD780FF>Polestar Field</color>{/LINK}.\n<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color>: The <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Precision</color> effect obtained when {LINK#N11500004}<color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Mark</color>{/LINK} is activated will also increase all Stellar-Conduct DMG dealt by nearby teammates by 25%.

p4.name: Treetop Watch
p4.description: Displays the location of nearby <color=#FFD780FF>resources unique to Snezhnaya</color> on the mini-map.

const1.name: Frostvale Thunderclap
const1.description: Alyosha regenerates 15 Elemental Energy when nearby party members trigger an <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro-related reaction</color>. This effect can trigger once every 18s.

const2.name: Howl From Afar
const2.description: The duration of the Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Advance</color> is extended by 6s.\nAdditionally, each time {LINK#N11500005}<color=#FFD780FF>Tugarin</color>{/LINK} attacks the opponent, it will first apply the {LINK#N11500004}<color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Mark</color>{/LINK}. This effect does not activate existing <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Marks</color>.

const3.name: Kindred Call
const3.description: Increases the Level of the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Thunderbolt Ambush</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

const4.name: Spoils of the Hunt
const4.description: When {LINK#N11500005}<color=#FFD780FF>Tugarin</color>{/LINK} attacks, it will also restore 60% of Alyosha's ATK as HP to the nearby party member with the lowest HP by percentage.

const5.name: When the Birdsong Falls Silent
const5.description: Increases the Level of the Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Advance</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15.

const6.name: Standard Reclaimed
const6.description: The <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Precision</color> effect obtained from activating {LINK#N11500004}<color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Mark</color>{/LINK} can now stack, max 2 stacks. When the stack count reaches 2, characters affected by <color=#FFD780FF>Hunter's Precision</color> will also have their Elemental Mastery increased by 100.

hyperlinks.name: Polestar Field
hyperlinks.description: When Stellar-Conduct is triggered, the surrounding area will transform into a Polestar Field for a short period of time, and when inside a Polestar Field, certain characters will enter the Radiance: Stellar-Conduct state, which grants various skill buffs.

hyperlinks.name: Hunter's Mark
hyperlinks.description: A special effect Alyosha can apply on the opponent.\nWhen this effect is applied to an opponent who is already under the Hunter's Mark effect, it will activate Hunter's Mark instead, which removes said mark and grants all nearby party members the Hunter's Precision effect, increasing their ATK for 15s.

hyperlinks.name: Tugarin
hyperlinks.description: Alyosha's trusted hunting hound and companion, which can be summoned to the field using the Elemental Burst Hunter's Advance.\nIf there are opponents nearby, every 2s Tugarin will swiftly move close to an opponent and deal a mauling attack to them, dealing Electro DMG. If an opponent that is hit is also under the Hunter's Mark effect, the hit will also trigger Hunter's Mark. The DMG dealt here is considered Elemental Burst DMG.\nWhen more than one opponent is available, Tugarin will attack the ones under the Hunter's Mark effect first.
